paragraphs.text: It is unacceptable for dominant corporations to exploit their market power to stifle competition and monopolise entire sectors. Such practices must be firmly prohibited. The European Union has consistently stood as a global leader in protecting rights and freedoms, and it is now imperative that its authorities take decisive action. We must remain united in confronting the undue influence of significant corporate interests. Just as scrutiny has rightly been applied to Apple, the same vigilance and determination must be directed toward Google. Ensuring fair competition is not only an economic necessity but also a fundamental matter of justice and protecting consumers rights.
